synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21687 Oracle Linux 7 glib2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21687
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21687

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21687.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
glib2-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.i686.rpm
glib2-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-devel-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.i686.rpm
glib2-devel-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-doc-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.noarch.rpm
glib2-fam-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-static-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.i686.rpm
glib2-static-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
glib2-tests-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/glib2-2.56.1-9.0.1.el7_9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.56.1-9.0.1]
- Fix overflow of GDBusConnection serial [Orabug: 38666376]
